summary: Frontend-only regression testing completed for Royal Spark category-page cleanup. Verified product-only category views on desktop/mobile and preserved header category navigation behavior.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for requested frontend scope.
Keep validating category-page product-only layout after future shop-page changes.
critical_code_review_comments: Shop page implementation is aligned with requirement: no left filter/sidebar section rendered in category/material views.
Header category bar remains globally visible and links correctly to /shop?category=* and /shop?material=Moissanite.
Catalog/product data is MOCKED via local seeded backend data; Shopify readiness remains informational only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public URL with browser automation: /shop?category=Rings and /shop?material=Moissanite both show clean product-only grids; no sidebar/filter panel found on desktop or mobile; homepage and contact navigation also pass.
rca of the issue: No defect reproduced in requested scope. DOM/query checks showed no sidebar/filter container on category views; behavior confirms the cleanup change is effective.
